mapper.insert: INSERT INTO noticex(title, content, writer, reg_date, hit) VALUES(#{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, writer, reg_date, hit FROM noticex WHERE id = #{id};
mapper.update: UPDATE noticex SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, writer = #{writer}, reg_date = #{regDate} where id = #{id};
UPDATE noticex SET hit = hit + 1 where id = #{id};
